name: Berkshire Apple Pie
recipeInstructions: Note: If using canned apples instead of fresh, use the canned variety (not apple pie filling) and add a bit more sugar as they can be tart. Mix dough ingredients with an electric mixer. Place apples in the pie plate with cinnamon and sugar. Pour batter over the apples. Do not worry about spreading the batter; it will spread during baking. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes (375°F if using a glass pan).
